TCF Canada Registration process
Step 1 -
Selection of the Appropriate Test
Ensure the test you choose matches your needs. Remember, the Alliance Française of Calgary and its staff are not
liable for your test choice.
For any doubts, consult the immigration services or a relevant authority.
Step 2 -
Date Selection and Payment
Please choose your date and complete the payment process with a credit card.
Refunds are not
available.
To check availability for test dates and book your spot, click on the link provided below.
TCF Canada
4 Mandatory Tests (computer)
July
2026 sessions

2026 sessions
Registrations
Registrations
IMPORTANT
All 2026 exam dates will be published on this page. We are currently working with our partners in Paris to open additional sessions.
This page is the most up-to-date source of information—please check it regularly, as
our reception
team does not have additional details
.
New dates will always be posted here first.
Please do not call regarding exam dates. Our TEF/TCF Manager works remotely and is not available by phone.
For questions about the exam itself (
not dates
), you may contact us at
tests@afcalgary.ca
.
All exams are offered on a first-come, first-served basis. We appreciate your patience and ask that all interactions with our staff remain
respectful.
Step 3
- Detail Submission
You will receive an email with a link to complete the TCF registration form
. Please fill it out carefully and upload a
valid ID (driver’s license or passport).
Once submitted, we will process your registration on the France Éducation International platform and send you a confirmation email.
Please
note that this is done manually during business hours
.
Make sure you have purchased your exam spot before submitting the form, as unpaid registrations will be voided.
If you do not receive a confirmation within one week, please contact us to verify your registration status.
Step 4 -
Preparation
(optional)
For effective exam preparation, consider the resources from the Prepmyfuture platform which provides a comprehensive
suite of practice materials tailored to the TCF exam format. Access to Prepmyfuture TCF is available for a
$
80
fee below.
PURCHASE
A CODE
PURCHASE
A CODE
No refund or deferment is possible. Cancellations for climatic or personal reasons are not possible.
Any request for cancellation without refund must be submitted by email to
tests@afcalgary.ca
.
